results.question: २०६२/६३ को आन्दोलन के थियो?

results.answer: २०६२/६३ को आन्दोलन दोस्रो जनआन्दोलन थियो, जसले नेपालमा निरङ्कुश शासनको अन्त्य गर्न महत्वपूर्ण भूमिका खेलेको थियो। राजा ज्ञानेन्द्रले प्रत्यक्ष शासन सुरु गरेपछि नेपाली कांग्रेस, नेकपा एमाले, नेपाली कांग्रेस (प्रजातान्त्रिक), जनमोर्चा नेपाल, नेपाल मजदुर किसान पार्टी, नेपाल सद्भावना पार्टी (आनन्दीदेवी) र संयुक्त वाममोर्चासहित सातदलीय गठबन्धन निर्माण भयो। यस आन्दोलनले २०६३ माघ १ गते नेपालको अन्तरिम संविधान, २०६३ जारी गर्न र संविधानसभाको चुनाव गर्ने वातावरण बनाउन मद्दत पुर्यायो।

correctness.reason: The system answer is fully correct and provides additional context about the movement.

faithfulness.reason: Every factual claim in the answer is supported by the retrieved context.

results.question: What was the 2062/63 movement in Nepal?
results.gold: It was the second People's Movement (Jana Andolan).
results.answer: The 2062/63 movement in Nepal, also known as the Second People's Movement, was a peaceful uprising that took place from Chaitra 24, 2062 to Baisakh 11, 2063 (April 2006). It was a response to King Gyanendra's direct rule, which began on Magh 19, 2061. The movement was led by a coalition of seven political parties, including the Nepali Congress and the Communist Party of Nepal (UML), and later included the Communist Party of Nepal (Maoist) after a 12-point agreement in New Delhi. The movement aimed to restore democracy and led to the signing of a comprehensive peace agreement on Mangsir 5, 2063, and the promulgation of the Interim Constitution on Magh 1, 2063.

correctness.reason: The system answer is fully correct and provides detailed context about the movement.

faithfulness.reason: Every claim in the answer is supported by the retrieved context.
